member.name: T:RfmOta.Exceptions.OtaException
member.summary: An that is thrown when an error occurs during Ota updates

member.name: M:RfmOta.Exceptions.OtaException.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:RfmOta.Exceptions.OtaException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The message that describes the error.

member.name: M:RfmOta.Exceptions.OtaException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The error message that explains the reason for the exception.
The exception that is the cause of the current exception, or a null reference (Nothing in Visual Basic) if no inner exception is specified.

member.name: M:RfmOta.Exceptions.OtaException.#ctor(System.Runtime.Serialization.SerializationInfo,System.Runtime.Serialization.StreamingContext)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with serialized data.
member.param: The that holds the serialized object data about the exception being thrown.
The that contains contextual information about the source or destination.

member.summary: The of of bytes to flash to the device

member.summary: Add a flash write

member.summary: Get the consolidated set of flash writes

member.name: T:RfmOta.IOtaService
member.summary: Defines the interface for the Ota service

member.name: M:RfmOta.IOtaService.OtaUpdate(RfmUsb.Net.IRfm,System.IO.Stream,System.UInt32@)
member.summary: Perform an Ota update of an Rfm69 node that is running in bootloader mode
member.param: The instance to transmit and receive ota update data
The stream for the hex file to upload to the device
The crc calculated for the uploaded flash image
member.remarks: The depends on an instance to transmit and receive packets. The containing application must open initialise and close the instance.
